center.name: Leeton, New South Wales
center.summary: Leeton is a town in the Riverina region of New South Wales, Australia.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Ranging from near West Wyalong in New South Wales to the Murchison River in Western Australia. In New South Wales, they are found in two isolated populations: one between Leeton, Willandra National Park, Nymagee and West Wyalong; and the other from Balranald to Trentham Cliffs
